---
title: '10 Things a Real Man Does When Heâ€™s in a Relationship'
date: '2019-06-08T08:12:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3315273516046147770'
blogger_filename: '/2019/06/10-things-real-man-does-when-hes-in.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">
<h1 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;"><a href="https://www.lifehack.org/articles/communication/10-things-real-man-does-when-hes-relationship.html">https://www.lifehack.org/articles/communication/10-things-real-man-does-when-hes-relationship.html</a>  <o:p></o:p></span></h1>
<h1 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;">10 Things a Real Man Does When He's in a Relationship<o:p></o:p></span></h1>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><a href="https://www.lifehack.org/author/david-k-william"><span style="color: #1c5796; text-decoration: none;"></span></a><span style="color: #1c5796; text-decoration: none;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-761362-24d7c431f66c.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6700041870853869650" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-761362-35f344cbcdc9.jpg" /></a></span>&lt;img   alt='' src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201%201'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-src='https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d73b5f0f416ec0da468f913d3d0c2332?s=50&amp;#038;r=g' data-lazy-srcset='https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d73b5f0f416ec0da468f913d3d0c2332?s=100&amp;#038;r=g   2x' class=' avatar-50 photo' height='50' width='50'&gt;&lt;noscript&gt;&lt;img alt='' src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201%201'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-src='https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d73b5f0f416ec0da468f913d3d0c2332?s=50&amp;#038;r=g'   data-lazy-srcset='https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d73b5f0f416ec0da468f913d3d0c2332?s=100&amp;#038;r=g 2x' class=' avatar-50 photo' height='50' width='50'&gt;&lt;noscript&gt;&lt;img alt='' src='https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d73b5f0f416ec0da468f913d3d0c2332?s=50&amp;#038;r=g'   srcset='https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d73b5f0f416ec0da468f913d3d0c2332?s=100&amp;#038;r=g 2x' class=' avatar-50 photo' height='50' width='50'&gt;<a href="https://www.lifehack.org/author/david-k-william">David K. William</a><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="short-bio" style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">David is a publisher and entrepreneur who tries to help professionals grow their business and careers, and gives advice for entrepreneurs.  <a href="https://www.lifehack.org/author/david-k-william">Read full profile</a><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image002-763510-f9b95ecf5284.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6700041884346801954" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image002-763510-341e2e2404ea.jpg" /></a></span><span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">&lt;img   src="/images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/ed-ivanushkin-96d6da3fccf3.jpg" class="figure-img img-fluid" alt="10 Things a Real Man Does When He&amp;#8217;s in a Relationship"&gt;  <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<ul type="disc">
<li class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; color: #212529;">  <span style="font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="Share on Facebook">Share</a><o:p></o:p></span></li>
<li class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; color: #212529;">  <span style="font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="Share on Pinterest">Pin it</a><o:p></o:p></span></li>
<li class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; color: #212529;">  <span style="font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="Share on Twitter">Tweet</a><o:p></o:p></span></li>
<li class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; color: #212529;">  <span style="font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="Share on LinkedIn">Share</a><o:p></o:p></span></li>
<li class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; color: #212529;">  <span style="font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><a href="mailto:?subject=10%20Things%20a%20Real%20Man%20Does%20When%20He%26%238217%3Bs%20in%20a%20Relationship&amp;body=Hi%20there%21%0A%0AI%20thought%20you%20might%20like%20this%20article%3A%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fwww.lifehack.org%2Farticles%2Fcommunication%2F10-things-real-man-does-when-hes-relationship.html%0A%0AThis%20is%20just%20a%20one-time%20email.%20If%20you%20want%20to%20get%20more%20articles%20like%20this%20subscribe%20to%20Lifehack%27s%20newsletter%20at%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fwww.lifehack.org" title="Share by email">Email</a><o:p></o:p></span></li>
</ul>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">Some women feel a "Real Man" doesn't existâ€”that he is impossible to find. Other women do not want someone like him. On the other hand, some men think they are the very definition of a   "Real Man." Other men feel there is no such thing. One thing is true, though: Those men who think they are the very definition of a "Real Man" and those who think they are not are both very often  <em><span style="font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">wrong</span></em>.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">If you want to know if you are a real man or are in a relationship with a real man, watch the actions. A real man behaves so different from the selfish frat boy types you see everywhere   that you can't fail to notice the difference. He is a gentlemanâ€”good for more than just the first few months. Importantly, a real man does things so well when he is in a relationship that you just have to love him and his style.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;">1.&nbsp;A real man loves and respects his woman for who she is.  <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">He might not love her all the time, but he loves her. Not just her body, her possessions and her status, but all of  <em><span style="font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">her</span></em>! He's aware that as beautiful as her body is now, physical beauty fades. He therefore focuses his love and attention on her true beauty, which is found within her sensibilities and personality. He treats her   like a lady, with dignity and respect. He doesn't mind cooking her favorite meal, taking her out to wine and dine and paying the bills. He also expects love and respect from her.  <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">Advertising<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<h2 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;">2.&nbsp;A real man commits to the relationship fully.<o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">He doesn't cheat. He is loyal to his partner and knows that relationships take hard work to keep strong and healthy. His affection to his woman is a full-time commitment. He nourishes   and strengthens the relationship through ongoing, honest communication and team work. When you are with a real man, you know you can trust him. He will stay faithful no matter what and expects you to do the same.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;">3. A real man protects his partner physically and emotionally.<o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">Not that a woman can't protect and defend herself, but he is there for her anyway. He protects her in different ways, including providing financial security and comforting her and making   her feel everything will be okay. He is ready to throw a good punch if necessary to defend her from physical aggressors. However, he thinks before he acts. He never makes a move until he is sure all details and specifics are in order. His moves are calculated,   deliberate and assured. Abuse of any kind is never an issue when you are with him. He is considerate and treats everyone kindly.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;">4.&nbsp;A real man fulfills his partner mentally and sexually.<o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">He knows the majority of time in any relationship is spent doing nonphysical, nonsexual things. Besides whispering to her how beautiful she is or how he is going to make hot, passionate   love to her when he gets back home in the evening, he also engages her in meaningful discussions about life, plans with her for the future, and cracks jokes to lighten and liven moments together. He displays an awareness, intelligence and sensitivity that   makes his actions not only timely, but also genuinely charming.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">Advertising<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<h2 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;">5. A real man takes the first initiativeâ€”he leads.<o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">That's because he wears the pants in the relationship. Of course, the pants are picked out by his woman, but he is still the leader. He steps forward and addresses issues in the relationship   boldly. He does not wait for the woman to solve problems. If he is not sure how to address an issue, he seeks help or advice. Some men play it safe and avoid taking the lead because they don't want to be criticized, but not a real man. A real man says, "I'll   handle it," and takes the initiative to solve the issue in his way.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h3 align="center" style="background: #e9ecef; text-align: center;">
<span style="background: white; color: #212529; text-transform: uppercase;">Read Next</span><span style="color: #212529; text-transform: uppercase;"><o:p></o:p></span></h3>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><a href="https://www.lifehack.org/374773/6-reasons-why-french-press-makes-the-best-coffee"><span style="color: #1c5796; text-decoration: none;"></span></a><span style="color: #1c5796; text-decoration: none;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image003-765581-9be76c3b9f50.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6700041889976880770" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image003-765581-4a9af9226f88.jpg" /></a></span>&lt;img   width="370" height="208" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201%201'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-src="/images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/french-press-coffee-370x208-7142220d1491.jpeg" class="no-caption wp-post-image"   alt="" data-lazy-srcset="/images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/french-press-coffee-370x208-7142220d1491.jpeg 370w, /images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/french-press-coffee-740x416-e9f602541ed3.jpeg 740w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 370px) 100vw, 370px"&gt;&lt;noscript&gt;&lt;img   width="370" height="208" src="/images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/french-press-coffee-370x208-7142220d1491.jpeg" class="no-caption wp-post-image" alt="" srcset="/images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/french-press-coffee-370x208-7142220d1491.jpeg 370w, /images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/french-press-coffee-740x416-e9f602541ed3.jpeg   740w" sizes="(max-width: 370px) 100vw, 370px"&gt;<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h6 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;"><a href="https://www.lifehack.org/374773/6-reasons-why-french-press-makes-the-best-coffee">6 Reasons Why French Press Makes the Best Coffee</a><o:p></o:p></span></h6>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><a href="https://www.lifehack.org/835483/average-retirement-savings"><span style="color: #1c5796; text-decoration: none;"></span></a><span style="color: #1c5796; text-decoration: none;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image004-767072-f4116dabb89b.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6700041897244656850" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image004-767072-77046f1d0742.jpg" /></a></span>&lt;img   width="370" height="208" src="/images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/average-retirement-savings-370x208-6e2c24802db1.jpeg" class="no-caption wp-post-image" alt="" srcset="/images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/average-retirement-savings-370x208-6e2c24802db1.jpeg   370w, /images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/average-retirement-savings-740x416-7e148f22a14d.jpeg 740w" sizes="(max-width: 370px) 100vw, 370px"&gt;<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h6 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;"><a href="https://www.lifehack.org/835483/average-retirement-savings">The Average Retirement Savings and How to Save Wisely</a><o:p></o:p></span></h6>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><a href="https://www.lifehack.org/429885/study-says-art-makes-you-mentally-healthier-even-if-youre-not-good-at-it"><span style="color: #1c5796; text-decoration: none;"></span></a><span style="color: #1c5796; text-decoration: none;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image005-769038-038a13a6c795.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6700041906029956450" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image005-769038-c2e87bec09bb.jpg" /></a></span>&lt;img   width="370" height="208" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201%201'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-src="/images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-15a4ec4ea2c6.jpg" class="no-caption wp-post-image"   alt="" data-lazy-srcset="/images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-15a4ec4ea2c6.jpg 850w, /images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-768x432-ab3dd35ed242.jpg 768w, /images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-380x214-91ec8a66deba.jpg   380w, /images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-370x208-1fdd20ade1c6.jpg 370w, /images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-350x197-f173b758226e.jpg 350w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 370px) 100vw, 370px"&gt;&lt;noscript&gt;&lt;img width="370"   height="208" src="/images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-15a4ec4ea2c6.jpg" class="no-caption wp-post-image" alt="" srcset="/images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-15a4ec4ea2c6.jpg 850w, /images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-768x432-ab3dd35ed242.jpg   768w, /images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-380x214-91ec8a66deba.jpg 380w, /images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-370x208-1fdd20ade1c6.jpg 370w, /images/imported/cdn-lifehack-org/guy-painting-350x197-f173b758226e.jpg   350w" sizes="(max-width: 370px) 100vw, 370px"&gt;<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h6 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;"><a href="https://www.lifehack.org/429885/study-says-art-makes-you-mentally-healthier-even-if-youre-not-good-at-it">Study Says Art Makes You Mentally Healthier, Even If You're Not Good At It</a><o:p></o:p></span></h6>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span class="scroll-text1"><span style="font-family: &quot;muli&quot;; font-size: 9.5pt;">Scroll down to continue reading article  </span></span><span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;">6.&nbsp;A real man steps up and makes the tough decisions.<o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">He knows real men are decisive and he makes decisions in the relationship. He does not leave every other decision to his partner. When making decisions, he seeks to understand her views   (and that of other concerned parties) and is flexible enough to factor in those other views in his decisions. He does not seek to control people, but rather to improve their situation. If you are reluctant to make decisions, you are likely self-conscious and   afraid of making mistakes. Women dislike indecisive, cowardly men.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;">7. A real man takes responsibility for his actions and decisions.<o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">He does not shift blame (especially to his partner) or try to defend his mistakes. He simply acknowledges when he has made a mistake, apologizes for it, learns from it and works to make   it right. Saying, "I am sorry," is not a big deal to him. He knows it doesn't make him any less of a man to say it. In fact, saying he's sorry makes him more of a man because it demonstrates he has the confidence, courage and integrity to admit his faults   and seek to correct them. <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">Advertising<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<h2 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;">8.&nbsp;A real man speaks his mindâ€”always.<o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">He is not afraid or timid to say what's on his mind. He will say no without fear whenever he doesn't agree with something. He will debate you on topics he is not comfortable with without   losing his cool. He will be straightforward and talk to you as an equal, then allow you to make your own conclusions or take whatever action you wish. This does not mean he is indifferent or treats women badly. He just doesn't agree with her on everything.   He knows a "Yes-man" is no man at all.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;">9.&nbsp;A real man stands up for the relationship.<o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">Sometimes friends, family and even total strangers ask inappropriate questions or make inappropriate remarks about your relationship, such as saying you are not a "good couple." In such   cases, a real man stands up for himself and defends the legitimacy and integrity of his relationship. Even when he is among his peers, he speaks up and stands his ground in defense of his relationship. This&nbsp;proves he can express himself in the presence others,   protect his woman and act like a grown man.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529;">10. A real man pursues other passion(s) that don't involve his partner.<o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div style="background: white;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">He has enough going on in his life to keep him busy. That means he is, at least, passionate about one other thing besides his relationship. The relationship does not define him. He will   give you your space and you must give him his. He is a confident, ambitious go-getter. He's a real man!  <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">
<span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">Advertising<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div style="background: white;">
<span class="credit"><span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;">Featured photo credit:  <a href="https://www.flickr.com/photos/barsen/2678772498/sizes/l">Ed Ivanushkin via flickr.com</a></span></span><span style="color: #212529; font-family: &quot;muli&quot;;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<b><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;">Darrell Wolfe<o:p></o:p></span></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<b><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">Triage Associate | Account Protection  <o:p></o:p></span></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">Alliance Data  </span><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">751 W Hanley, Coeur d'Alene, ID 83815<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="http://www.knowmoresellmore.com/"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">knowmoresellmore.com</span></a><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">   | </span><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/2973795?trk=tyah"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">LinkedIn  </span></a><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">|  </span><a href="https://www.facebook.com/KnowMoreSellMore"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">Facebook</span></a><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">  </span><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">|  </span><a href="https://twitter.com/know_sellmore"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">Twitter</span></a><span style="font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;">  <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
</div>
<br clear="both" />
______________________________________________________________________<br />
The information contained in this e-mail message and any attachments may be privileged and confidential. If the reader of this message is not the intended recipient or an agent responsible for delivering it to the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any review, dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender immediately by replying to this e-mail and delete the message and any attachments from your computer.<br />
______________________________________________________________________
